title: dcg-iye.3
description:
Verify and signoff 4 docs against actual code:
- docs/plans/03c-packs-infra-cloud.md (not started) → internal/packs/infrastructure/, internal/packs/cloud/
- docs/plans/03c-packs-infra-cloud-test-harness.md (not started) → e2etest/
- docs/plans/03d-packs-containers-k8s.md (not started) → internal/packs/containers/, internal/packs/kubernetes/

For each doc: read thoroughly, compare every type/function/test category against code, run tests, add Completion Signoff section (Complete or Partial with gaps). Report gaps via h2 send to dcg-scheduler. Commit updated docs.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completed in commit 033dda8. All 4 docs signed off as Partial.
